# Sponsorship Inventory and Yield

> **Version:** 1.0.0
> **Status:** planned
> **Provenance:** 1P
> **Derives From:** `marketplace` (advertising model), `ddd`

Physical advertising inventory management and yield optimization. AXPONA sells audience attention through 40+ sponsorship items across 6 categories ($500–$12,000). Demand exceeds supply (heavy SOLD markers). Fastest-growing revenue line — 4.3x since 2018.

---

## Overview

Sponsorship is functionally an advertising business layered on a physical event. Sponsors buy audience impressions — but instead of digital impressions (programmatic, CPM), they buy physical placements (lanyard branding, lounge naming, signage). The yield optimization challenge is the same: maximize revenue per unit of inventory.

At 42 paid sponsorships generating $164K (2025), the average is ~$3,900 per sponsorship. With demand exceeding supply on premium items, there's pricing headroom. Each $1K increase in average price = ~$42K incremental revenue.

### The Flow

```
Sponsorship Sales       Sponsor              Event Operations
    │                       │                       │
    │  InventoryPresented   │                       │
    ├──────────────────────▶│                       │
    │                       │                       │
    │  SponsorshipSold      │                       │
    │◀──────────────────────┤                       │
    │                       │                       │
    │  AgreementActivated   │                       │
    ├───────────────────────│──────────────────────▶│
    │                       │                       │
    │              [Show Live — deliverables placed] │
    │                       │                       │
    │  SponsorshipDelivered │                       │
    │◀──────────────────────┼──────────────────────▶│
    │                       │                       │
    │  RenewalOffered       │                       │
    ├──────────────────────▶│                       │
```

## Capabilities

- sponsorship-inventory-management
- sponsorship-tier-pricing
- sponsorship-deliverable-tracking
- sponsorship-delivery-verification
- sponsorship-renewal-management

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Formula | Target |
|--------|---------|--------|
| Fill rate | sold / available | >= 90% |
| CPM equivalent | revenue / (attendees / 1000) | Increasing YoY |
| Avg sponsorship value | revenue / count | Increasing |
| Renewal rate | renewed / prior_year | >= 70% |

## Related Patterns

- `exhibitor-lifecycle-management` — sponsors are often exhibitors (cross-sell)
- `sponsorship-yield-analytics` — measures this pattern
- `maximize-sponsorship-yield` — the goal pattern
